allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); scripts=d.get\('scripts',{}\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; mcp={k:v for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'mcp' in k.lower\(\) or 'model-context' in k.lower\(\)}; print\('MCP packages:', json.dumps\(mcp, indent=2\)\); print\('Relevant scripts:', {k:v for k,v in scripts.items\(\) if 'mcp' in k.lower\(\) or 'collab' in k.lower\(\)}\)")
